external_suite_improvement_policy.routing_rule: Map PPT/visual failure tokens to contracts/capability_map.json before proposing or patching RCA professional skill, stage prompt, docs, contract, or focused test surfaces; use dry_run_token_mapping_check for non-live token resolution; if no capability hits, return a typed blocker candidate instead of touching visual truth or runtime artifacts.
external_suite_improvement_policy.closeout_rule: OMA may return refs-only work orders, patch candidates, no-regression evidence refs, or typed blocker candidates; RCA owner receipt, review/export verdict, visual truth, and artifact authority remain RCA-owned.
